title: Case summary (SOP)
description: Structured narrative for case documentation and PDF export; emphasizes FACTS / INFERENCES / UNKNOWNS / NEXT STEPS.
system_prompt_append:
This turn supports a **case summary** suitable for {{report_label}} (audience: **{{audience}}**).
- Prioritize ## FACTS FROM TOOLS with explicit tool names and ids.
- Keep ## INFERENCES clearly labeled as hypotheses.
- List open questions under ## UNKNOWNS.
- Under ## NEXT STEPS, list concrete actions (owner, tool, id) — advisory only.
- If audience is **executive**, add a short opening paragraph (3–5 sentences) with impact and recommended decision **only** from tool-backed facts; mark gaps explicitly.
